document.name: coding-redesign-cli-showcase
document.title: Coding redesign (CLI): clone repo → plan/generate/critic → PR (Playwright critic)
document.summary: The plan agent clones PittampalliOrg/sveltekit-landing-demo, then a plan/generate/critic loop redesigns the SvelteKit landing page: the CRITIC drives the pre-installed Playwright+Chromium to screenshot the running app and judge it against a 4-dimension design rubric, a deterministic build gate must pass, and the result is opened as a pull request. GITHUB_TOKEN is auto-injected into the cli session. Same workspace-backend family per run (interactive-cli).

intent.title: Redesign request
intent.default: Redesign the Nimbus Notes landing page (src/routes/+page.svelte plus a global stylesheet) into a polished, DISTINCTIVE product landing page with a coherent visual identity — strong typography hierarchy, deliberate color/spacing, a hero, the three feature cards, a pricing section, and a clear primary CTA. Plain SvelteKit + CSS only; keep `npm run build` passing; do NOT change package.json deps or routing.
intent.description: What the agents change in the repo.

planAgent.title: Planner agent
planAgent.description: PLAN phase agent (clones + writes SPEC). Same workspace-backend family as the others.

intent.title: Redesign request
intent.default: Redesign the Nimbus Notes landing page (src/routes/+page.svelte plus a global stylesheet) into a polished, DISTINCTIVE product landing page with a coherent visual identity — strong typography hierarchy, deliberate color/spacing, a hero, the three feature cards, a pricing section, and a clear primary CTA. Plain SvelteKit + CSS only; keep `npm run build` passing; do NOT change package.json deps or routing.
intent.description: What the agents change in the repo.

planAgent.title: Planner agent
planAgent.description: PLAN phase agent (clones + writes SPEC). Same workspace-backend family as the others.

agentConfig.name: Planner
agentConfig.instructions: You are the Planner for a coding redesign task on a SvelteKit repo. FIRST clone the repo into /sandbox/work/repo by running this exact shell command:\n  cd /sandbox/work && rm -rf repo && git clone \"https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/PittampalliOrg/sveltekit-landing-demo.git\" repo && cd repo && git config user.name 'workflow-builder agent' && git config user.email 'agent@workflow-builder.local' && git remote set-url origin \"https://github.com/PittampalliOrg/sveltekit-landing-demo.git\"\nThen READ the repo (especially src/routes/+page.svelte and package.json) and the redesign request, and write a concise product+design spec to /sandbox/work/SPEC.md (ONLY that file; do NOT edit the repo yet). SPEC.md must contain markdown sections: Objective (one paragraph), Acceptance Criteria (bulleted, checkable — specific sections/components, build passes, no dep changes), and a Design Rubric naming the FOUR dimensions: design_quality (coherent whole, distinct mood/identity), originality (deliberate custom choices vs generic/template defaults), craft (typography hierarchy, spacing, color harmony, contrast), functionality (usable, responsive, accessible). End with a one-line summary.

body.prompt:
${ "You are the Planner for a coding redesign task on a SvelteKit repo. FIRST clone the repo into /sandbox/work/repo by running this exact shell command:
  cd /sandbox/work && rm -rf repo && git clone \"https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/PittampalliOrg/sveltekit-landing-demo.git\" repo && cd repo && git config user.name 'workflow-builder agent' && git config user.email 'agent@workflow-builder.local' && git remote set-url origin \"https://github.com/PittampalliOrg/sveltekit-landing-demo.git\"
Then READ the repo (especially src/routes/+page.svelte and package.json) and the redesign request, and write a concise product+design spec to /sandbox/work/SPEC.md (ONLY that file; do NOT edit the repo yet). SPEC.md must contain markdown sections: Objective (one paragraph), Acceptance Criteria (bulleted, checkable — specific sections/components, build passes, no dep changes), and a Design Rubric naming the FOUR dimensions: design_quality (coherent whole, distinct mood/identity), originality (deliberate custom choices vs generic/template defaults), craft (typography hierarchy, spacing, color harmony, contrast), functionality (usable, responsive, accessible). End with a one-line summary.

---

Redesign request:
" + (.trigger.intent // "redesign the landing page") + "

Clone the repo, read it, write /sandbox/work/SPEC.md, then end with a one-line summary." }

refine.while: ${ ( ( (.loop.last.gate.result.stdout // .loop.last.gate.stdout // .loop.last.gate.result.output // .loop.last.gate.output // "") | test("OBJECTIVE PASS") ) and ( (.loop.last.evaluate.meets_criteria // false) == true ) ) | not }

agentConfig.name: Generator
agentConfig.instructions: You are the Generator. Redesign the SvelteKit landing page in /sandbox/work/repo to satisfy /sandbox/work/SPEC.md. FIRST read /sandbox/work/SPEC.md. Edit src/routes/+page.svelte and add a global stylesheet (e.g. src/routes/+layout.svelte importing app.css, or a <style> block) — plain SvelteKit + CSS, NO new dependencies, do NOT touch package.json or routing. You do NOT grade your own work: a deterministic build gate plus an independent design critic (who VIEWS the rendered page) evaluate each attempt. Each turn: address the build output AND critic feedback, make the most impactful improvement, ensure `npm run build` passes, end with a one-line summary.

body.prompt:
${ "You are the Generator. Redesign the SvelteKit landing page in /sandbox/work/repo to satisfy /sandbox/work/SPEC.md. FIRST read /sandbox/work/SPEC.md. Edit src/routes/+page.svelte and add a global stylesheet (e.g. src/routes/+layout.svelte importing app.css, or a <style> block) — plain SvelteKit + CSS, NO new dependencies, do NOT touch package.json or routing. You do NOT grade your own work: a deterministic build gate plus an independent design critic (who VIEWS the rendered page) evaluate each attempt. Each turn: address the build output AND critic feedback, make the most impactful improvement, ensure `npm run build` passes, end with a one-line summary.

---

Redesign request: " + (.trigger.intent // "redesign the landing page") + "

Repo: /sandbox/work/repo; spec: /sandbox/work/SPEC.md." + "

Your previous attempt:
" + (.loop.last.generate.content // "(first attempt)") + "

Build gate (must end OBJECTIVE PASS):
" + (.loop.last.gate.result.stdout // .loop.last.gate.stdout // .loop.last.gate.result.output // .loop.last.gate.output // "(not run yet)") + "

Design critic feedback:
" + (if .loop.last.evaluate then (.loop.last.evaluate.feedback // (.loop.last.evaluate | tojson)) else "(none yet)" end) + "

Make the build pass AND satisfy the critic, then end with a brief summary." }

with.command: cd /sandbox/work/repo && (npm install --no-audit --no-fund >/tmp/install.log 2>&1 && npm run build >/tmp/build.log 2>&1 && echo 'OBJECTIVE PASS: build OK' || { echo 'OBJECTIVE FAIL: build failed'; tail -40 /tmp/build.log; }) 2>&1; echo "__EXIT__$?"

agentConfig.name: Critic
agentConfig.instructions:
You are an exacting design Critic with strong taste, independent of the builder; you do NOT edit the work. INSPECT THE RENDERED PAGE: (1) start the dev server: `cd /sandbox/work/repo && (nohup npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173 >/tmp/dev.log 2>&1 &) ; sleep 10`. (2) screenshot with the pre-installed Playwright+Chromium: `PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=/opt/pw-browsers python3 - <<'PY'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
with sync_playwright() as p:
    b=p.chromium.launch()
    pg=b.new_page(viewport={'width':1280,'height':900})
    pg.goto('http://127.0.0.1:4173/', wait_until='networkidle', timeout=30000)
    pg.screenshot(path='/sandbox/work/critic-shot.png', full_page=True)
    b.close()
print('SHOT_OK')
PY`. (3) READ the image /sandbox/work/critic-shot.png AND src/routes/+page.svelte + CSS, and judge the redesign against /sandbox/work/SPEC.md and the FOUR dimensions. CALIBRATION: PASS only for genuinely polished, distinctive, usable work; generic/'fine' is NOT a pass. DEFAULT to not satisfied unless EVERY dimension is clearly strong; cite concrete evidence from the screenshot + code. End with ONLY a strict JSON object, no prose/fences: {"meets_criteria": boolean, "score": number 0-10, "perCriterion": [{"id": string, "met": boolean, "feedback": string}], "feedback": string}.

body.prompt:
${ "You are an exacting design Critic with strong taste, independent of the builder; you do NOT edit the work. INSPECT THE RENDERED PAGE: (1) start the dev server: `cd /sandbox/work/repo && (nohup npm run dev -- --host 127.0.0.1 --port 4173 >/tmp/dev.log 2>&1 &) ; sleep 10`. (2) screenshot with the pre-installed Playwright+Chromium: `PLAYWRIGHT_BROWSERS_PATH=/opt/pw-browsers python3 - <<'PY'
from playwright.sync_api import sync_playwright
with sync_playwright() as p:
    b=p.chromium.launch()
    pg=b.new_page(viewport={'width':1280,'height':900})
    pg.goto('http://127.0.0.1:4173/', wait_until='networkidle', timeout=30000)
    pg.screenshot(path='/sandbox/work/critic-shot.png', full_page=True)
    b.close()
print('SHOT_OK')
PY`. (3) READ the image /sandbox/work/critic-shot.png AND src/routes/+page.svelte + CSS, and judge the redesign against /sandbox/work/SPEC.md and the FOUR dimensions. CALIBRATION: PASS only for genuinely polished, distinctive, usable work; generic/'fine' is NOT a pass. DEFAULT to not satisfied unless EVERY dimension is clearly strong; cite concrete evidence from the screenshot + code. End with ONLY a strict JSON object, no prose/fences: {\"meets_criteria\": boolean, \"score\": number 0-10, \"perCriterion\": [{\"id\": string, \"met\": boolean, \"feedback\": string}], \"feedback\": string}.

---

Review the redesigned landing page in /sandbox/work/repo against /sandbox/work/SPEC.md. Start the dev server, screenshot it with Playwright to /sandbox/work/critic-shot.png, read that image + the source, then return ONLY the strict JSON verdict." }

with.command: cd /sandbox/work/repo && BR="redesign-$(date +%s)" && git checkout -b "$BR" && git add -A && (git commit -m 'Redesign Nimbus Notes landing page (workflow-builder plan/generate/critic)' || echo 'nothing to commit') && git push \"https://x-access-token:${GITHUB_TOKEN}@github.com/PittampalliOrg/sveltekit-landing-demo.git\" "HEAD:$BR" && PR=$(curl -sS -X POST -H \"Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_TOKEN}\" -H 'Accept: application/vnd.github+json' https://api.github.com/repos/PittampalliOrg/sveltekit-landing-demo/pulls -d "{\"title\":\"Redesign landing page (automated)\",\"head\":\"$BR\",\"base\":\"main\",\"body\":\"Automated redesign via the workflow-builder plan/generate/critic loop; a Playwright critic inspected the rendered UI.\"}") && echo "$PR" | python3 -c 'import sys,json;d=json.load(sys.stdin);print("PR_URL="+str(d.get("html_url") or d.get("message") or d))'

set.terminalState: ${ if ( ( (.loop.last.gate.result.stdout // .loop.last.gate.stdout // .loop.last.gate.result.output // .loop.last.gate.output // "") | test("OBJECTIVE PASS") ) and ((.loop.last.evaluate.meets_criteria // false) == true) ) then "satisfied" else "max_iterations_reached" end }

artifacts.title: Coding redesign result
artifacts.description: Build + critic verdicts, iterations, PR output.
